holdings.infoBox: XCNY is an equity ETF with a total of 1242 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 19.34%, MediaTek at 2.78%, Delta Electronics at 2.02%, Accton Technology at 1.56%, and Hon Hai Precision Industry at 1.19%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Emerging Markets ex-China ETF (XCNY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Emerging ex China BMI index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of emerging market stocks, excluding China. The fund may include companies of any market capitalization, aiming for broad diversification. XCNY was launched on Sep 4, 2024 and is issued by State Street.
